verses.text: Galati mihaite aw, singlamteh tungah Jesuh Khrih a sihna thu teltakin na theihsa uh ahih manin kua' khemsa-in hici thei mawk na hi uh hiam
Thukham na zuihna hangun Pasian' Kha Siangtho ngah na hi uh hiam, ahih kei leh lungdamna thu za-in na upna hang uh hizaw ahi hiam
Pasian' Kha Siangtho tawh na patkhit uh ciangin nomau' thatanghat thu tawh khup a sawm ding zahin hici hai lawmlawm na hi uh hiam
A beisa huna na tuahsa uh thute khempeuh a mawkna suakkhin zen ding ahi hiam? Tawmkhat beek phattuamna hong pia thei tei dingin ka um hi
Note in Thukham na zuihna hangun Pasian in Kha Siangtho hong pia-in na lamdang hong bawl ahi hiam, ahih kei leh lungdamna thu za-in na upna hang uh hizaw ahi hiam
Abraham tunga thupiang ngaihsun dih un. Lai Siangtho in, “Abraham in Pasian um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in amah tawh a kipawlthei dingin mihoihin a sang hi,” na ci hi
Tua ahih manin Abraham' suanlekhak a man taktak i cihte pen upna a nei mite ahihna thu na theihding uh ahi hi

Jew mite mah bangin Gentail mite in zong a upna uh hangin amah tawh a kipawlthei dingin Pasian in a bawlna ding thu, Lai Siangtho in na ma theih hi. Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in Abraham tungah Lungdamna Thuthak na ma hilhkhol a, “Pasian in leitung mi khempeuh thupha a piakna dingin nangmah hong zang ding hi,” na ci hi
Abraham in a up manin Pasian in thupha a piak mah bangin Pasian a um midang khempeuh in zong thupha a ngah ahi uh hi

Hih thu tawh kisai-in Lai Siangtho in, “Thukham laibu sunga kigelh khempeuh a vekpi-in a zuikhin tawntung lote in Pasian' samsiatna thuak hi,” ci ahih manin Thukham a suangte pen samsiatna a ngah mite ahi uh hi
Tu-in Lai Siangtho in, “Upna hangin Pasian tawh a kipawlthei mite bek nungta ding hi,” na ci ahih manin Thukham hangin kuamah in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna a ngahlohna thu teltakin hong kilang hi
Lai Siangtho in, “Thukham' deih bangin a gamta zote nungta ding hi,” na ci ahih manin Thukham zuihna leh upna thu na kimemat khalo hi

Lai Siangtho in, “Sing tungah a kikhai mi peuhmah Pasian' samsiat mi ahi hi,” na ci ahih manin eite-a' dingin Khrih in samsiatna a thuak manin Thukham zuihlahna hangin samsiatna panin eite a hong tankhia ahi hi

Khrih in eite a hong tatna pen, eite in i upna hangin Pasian in a hong ciam Kha Siangtho ngahin, Pasian in Abraham tungah a ciam thuphate zong, Jesuh Khrih hangin Gentail mite tungah a kipiak theihna ding a deihna ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Thuciamsa, Thukham in Nungkheel Theilo

verses.text: Khrih sungah sanggamte aw, i theihtheih ngei gentehna khat ka hong zang ding hi. Mi nih in thu khatpeuhah thukimna nei-in letmat a thuhkhit uh ciangin kuamah in tua thukimna nungphiat theilo, zong behlap theilo hi

Tu-in Pasian in Abraham leh ama suanpa tungah thuciamna nei hi. Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelhna-ah, mi tampi a cihnopna ahi, “Na suan leh na khakte,” cih kammal na zanglo a, mi khat bek ahi Khrih a cihnopna-in, “Na suanpa,” ci-in na gen hi

Tu-in ka hong gennop thu in: Pasian in Abraham tawh thuciamna bawl a, tua a thuciamna peksat sawmlo hi. Tua ahih manin tua thuciamna a kibawlzawh kum zali leh kum sawmthum khit ciangin a kinung piak Thukham in tua thuciamna peksatin phiat theilo ding hi

Pasian' hong piakkhong pen Thukham zuihna hang tawh a kingah hi mawk leh piakding hong ciamna hangin a kingah hi nawnlo ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah letsong a piakna pen a thuciamnasa tawh kizui-in a piak ahi hi

Tua ahih leh Thukham bangin a kimang ding ahi hiam? Khialhna cih bang ahi hiam, cih a kitheihna dingin thuciamna banah hong kipiathuah hi a, thuciam a kipiakna, Abraham' suanpa' hun ciangdong bek a kimang dingin a kingaihsun ahi hi. Mihingte tungah Thukham hong kipiak lai-in vantung mi hong kisawlsawn a, mihing ahi Moses tungah hong kipiasawn hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in Abraham tungah thuciamna a bawl laitakin kuamah sawlsawn neiloin amah bek in a piak ahi hi.

Tua ahih leh Thukham leh Pasian' thuciamnate a kilehngat ahi uh hiam? Hi hetlo hi. Mihingte tungah hong kipia Thukham in nuntakna taktak hong pia thei hi leh tua Thukham zuihna hangin mi khempeuh in Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ngah ding uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh Khrih a um mite tungah a upna hangun Pasian' thuciam a kipiak theihna dingin Lai Siangtho in, “Mawhna khutnuai-ah leitung mi khempeuh a om hi,” na ci hi
Tua ahih manin upna thu hong tun'ma hun sungteng, upna thu a kilahkhiat ding ngakna-in Thukham in eite a hong hencip phot ahi hi
Tua hi a, i upna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna i ngahna dingin Khrih a hong pai hun ciangdong, Thukham in eite a hong uk ahi hi
Tu-in ahih leh upna hun hita ahih manin Thukham in eite hong uk thei nawnlo hi
Khrih Jesuh tawh na kipawl manun note khempeuh Pasian' tate na suahtheihna uh pen na upna hang uh ahi hi
Khrih sungah a kiphum note in Khrih' pianzia a nei khinta na hi uh hi
Tua ahih manin Jew mi leh Gentail mi, sila leh sila a hilo, numei leh pasal cih bangin kideidanna om nawnlo a, note khempeuh Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun pawlkhat hi-in, a kibangkim na hi uh hi
Khrih tawh na kipawl nak uh leh Abraham' suante na hita uh a, Pasian' hong khap thute a ngah ding na hi uh hi.
